name: EUWAX Aktiengesellschaft
summary: EUWAX Aktiengesellschaft provides financial services at the Stuttgart stock exchange in Germany. It manages various asset classes, such as securitized derivatives, domestic stocks, bonds, and funds/ETFs/ETCs. The company was formerly known as EUWAX Broker AG and changed its name to EUWAX Aktiengesellschaft in 2003. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Stuttgart, Germany. EUWAX Aktiengesellschaft operates as a subsidiary of Boerse Stuttgart GmbH.
